name: Nistrian Noble Cloak
description: Nistra is a fascinating land of many intertwined cultures. Nistrian nobles, who still stay true to the ancient traditions of Axonia, also eagerly embrace the customs of Pjesht highlanders - such as a preference for this style of cloak, for example.
descriptionZh: 尼斯特拉这片土地魅力无穷，多种文化交织相融。尼斯特拉的贵族虽然依旧遵守亚克逊古老的传统，但也愿意接受高地民族普耶什特的民俗，例如披着这种款式的斗篷。
